html:
Exclusive to:

The Root Trunk is a craftable Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Magic Tab, requires a Hogus Porkusator to prototype, and a Bramble Bulb, two Flytrap Stalks, and three Boards to craft.

A single Root Trunk functions similar to a Chest, but with 12 storage slots. Items can be stored in a Root Trunk by dragging them onto it or by opening the Root Chest to place them in specific slots.

What makes the Root Trunk special, however, is that it shares its inventory with all other Root Trunks built by the player. Therefore, it is possible to store items in them and transfer them from Root Trunk to Root Trunk instead of carrying them in the player's Inventory.

Unlike regular Chests, Root Trunks do not drop their contents if they are destroyed by Fire, with a Hammer or a Deconstruction Staff. If the last one of them has been destroyed, the items inside them are stored in limbo and can only be accessed again by building another Root Trunk.

Root Trunk can be opened by Pogs.

Trivia

  • Root Trunk was added in the March 18, 2019 update.
  • Root Trunk used to require only one Flytrap Stalk to craft, but it was changed in the March 28, 2019 update.

Gallery

  • A burnt Root Trunk.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“It rooted out all my things!”
–Wilson
“Now I don't have to lug everything around with me.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang's stuff many places now!”
–Wolfgang
“Saves my possessions. But it can't save my heart.”
–Wendy
“ACCESS TO ROOT DIRECTORY”
–WX-78
“A complex root system appears to allow the passage of goods.”
–Wickerbottom
“It moves all my stuff for me. That's nice.”
–Woodie
“Keeps my things just where I want them.”
–Maxwell
“A complex intelligent root system is moving my belongings for me. Fascinating!”
–Wagstaff
“The spöils öf the battle nöw föllöw me!”
–Wigfrid
“Now we don't have to carry our stuff everywhere.”
–Webber
“Now I don't gotta go far to get all my stuff.”
–Walani
“Mon dieu! What a wonderful time saver!”
–Warly
“Yarr! All o'Woodleg's treasures!”
–Woodlegs
“KEEPETH WILBA'S STUFF”
–Wilba
“Friends help carry stuff”
–Wormwood
“All my storage problems, solved!”
–Wheeler
The Root Trunk is a craftable Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Magic Tab, requires a Hogus Porkusator to prototype, and a Bramble Bulb, two Flytrap Stalks, and three Boards to craft.
A single Root Trunk functions similar to a Chest, but with 12 storage slots. Items can be stored in a Root Trunk by dragging them onto it or by opening the Root Chest to place them in specific slots.
What makes the Root Trunk special, however, is that it shares its inventory with all other Root Trunks built by the player. Therefore, it is possible to store items in them and transfer them from Root Trunk to Root Trunk instead of carrying them in the player's Inventory.
Unlike regular Chests, Root Trunks do not drop their contents if they are destroyed by Fire, with a Hammer or a Deconstruction Staff. If the last one of them has been destroyed, the items inside them are stored in limbo and can only be accessed again by building another Root Trunk.
Root Trunk can be opened by Pogs.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
Root Trunk was added in the March 18, 2019 update.
Root Trunk used to require only one Flytrap Stalk to craft, but it was changed in the March 28, 2019 update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Thân Rễ là một Kiến Trúc khả chế chỉ có trong Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy trong Thẻ Phép Thuật, yêu cầu Máy Hogus Porkusator để tạo nguyên mẫu và Củ Mâm Xôi, hai Thân Cây Bẫy Ruồi và ba Ván Ván để chế tạo.

All o'Woodleg's treasures! |wilba = KEEPETH WILBA'S STUFF |wormwood = Friends help carry stuff |wheeler = All my storage problems, solved! |choose = wickerbottom}} The '''Root Trunk''' is a craftable [[Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Magic Tab]], requires a [[Hogus Porkusator]] to prototype, and a [[Bramble Bulb]], two [[Flytrap Stalk]]s, and three [[Boards]] to craft. A single Root Trunk functions similar to a [[Chest]], but with 12 storage slots. Items can be stored in a Root Trunk by dragging them onto it or by opening the Root Chest to place them in specific slots. What makes the Root Trunk special, however, is that it shares its inventory with all other Root Trunks built by the player. Therefore, it is possible to store items in them and transfer them from Root Trunk to Root Trunk instead of carrying them in the player's [[Inventory]]. Unlike regular Chests, Root Trunks do not drop their contents if they are destroyed by [[Fire]], with a [[Hammer]] or a [[Deconstruction Staff]]. If the last one of them has been destroyed, the items inside them are stored in limbo and can only be accessed again by building another Root Trunk. Root Trunk can be opened by [[Pog]]s. =={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia== * Root Trunk was added in the March 18, 2019 update. * Root Trunk used to require only one [[Flytrap Stalk]] to craft, but it was changed in the March 28, 2019 update. =={{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Root Trunk Burnt.png|A burnt Root Trunk. {{Craftable Items|structure}} [[vi:Root Trunk]] [[Category:Magic Tab]] [[Category:Flammable Objects]]
